aboutPage.heroTitle: A Story That Began with Fire
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: From the heart of Iran to Doha, a flavor passed down through generations
aboutPage.storyP1: Kabab Dagh Nan Dagh restaurant was born in 2018 from a simple dream: to bring authentic Persian flavors to Qatar. Every skewer, every fresh bread, every stew comes from recipes handed down through generations of Iranian families.
aboutPage.storyP2: Today in the heart of Doha, we combine the spirit of Persian hospitality with unmatched quality, turning every meal into a memory.
aboutPage.value1Desc: Fresh meat and vegetables from the best local suppliers daily
aboutPage.value2Desc: Loyal to traditional Persian flavors, no shortcuts
aboutPage.value3Desc: Our kebabs are slowly grilled over real charcoal
aboutPage.ctaTitle: Ready to taste the real deal?

quotes.q1: If you have patience, you'll make halva from fermented grape juice
quotes.q2: Remember the one who didn't remember us when leaving
quotes.q3: Human beings are members of a whole
quotes.q5: Eating good food is the beginning of happiness
quotes.q6: That same night when the wine split the grape

reviews.title: Customer Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Real experiences from those who've tasted our food
reviews.r1text: The best Persian kebab I've had in Doha. Warm and welcoming atmosphere.
reviews.r2text: The food quality is outstanding, just like authentic homemade Persian cooking.
reviews.r3text: Fast service, authentic taste, reasonable prices. I'll definitely come back.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to your common questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our restaurant, menu and services
faq.a1: We are open daily from 11 AM to 12 AM.
faq.a2: Yes, you can order through Talabat, Snoonu, and Kita.
faq.a3: Yes, we have several vegetarian appetizers like Hummus and Shirazi Salad.
faq.q4: How can I reserve a table?
faq.a4: Call our restaurant or send a message through our contact page.

videoGallery.title: A Cinematic Experience of Our Catering Service
videoGallery.subtitle: An in-depth look at our service delivery, equipment and special event moments

main.title: A Royal BBQ Experience at Your Home
main.desc: Our professional team comes to your home with full equipment to serve live hot kebabs in front of your guests. Make it a memorable night!

tour.title: Equipment & Mobile Setup
tour.desc: A look at the professional setup and complete mobile kitchen equipment that provides the best service with minimal disruption to your space.

kabab.title: Master Chef Grilling in Front of You
kabab.desc: Watch the art of charcoal grilling with pure smoke aroma, right in your yard or reception hall. The excitement of a professional kitchen at your home!

moments.title: Special Memorable Events
moments.desc: Parties, birthdays and corporate events transformed into unforgettable nights with our home catering service.

chef.title: Head Chef & Expert Team
chef.desc: Meet our chefs and support team who come to your home in uniform with full hygiene standards.

catering.title: Hot Kebab at Your Home
catering.desc: Whether your party is at home, garden or cinema, we deliver and serve royal hot kebabs with VIP service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Register your information and we'll get back to you quickly.
contact.formDesc: Please fill in your details carefully so we can quickly process your order or message.

hours1.a: We are open every day from 8 AM to 2 AM.

hours2.a: Salwa Road, Al Rayyan, Doha, Qatar.

hours3.a: Yes, we are open on most public holidays.

menu1.a: Yes, we offer vegetarian appetizers like hummus, Shirazi salad, and yogurt with cucumber.

menu2.a: Most dishes are mildly spiced. For spicy options, try our Spicy Kofta or Spicy Chicken.

menu3.q: What languages is the menu in?
menu3.a: Our menu is available in Persian, Arabic, and English.

menu4.a: Yes, you can add special instructions in the notes field when ordering.

order1.q: How do I place an order?
order1.a: Add items to your cart from the menu page, then complete the checkout steps.

order2.a: Delivery within Doha is 10 QR. Outside Doha, it is calculated based on distance.

order3.a: Usually between 30 to 60 minutes, depending on distance and demand.

order4.q: Can I pick up my order?

order5.q: How do I track my order?
order5.a: After ordering, you will receive a confirmation message on WhatsApp. You can also call us for updates.

reservation1.q: How do I book a table?
reservation1.a: Call the restaurant directly or send a reservation request via WhatsApp.

reservation2.a: No, table reservations are completely free.

reservation3.q: How many people can I book for?
reservation3.a: We accommodate small to large groups, up to 20 people.

payment1.q: What payment methods do you accept?
payment1.a: Cash, in-person card payment, and online (card-to-card) are available.

payment2.a: Yes, in addition to on-site payment, online payment (card-to-card) is also available.

payment3.a: No, menu prices are final with no added tax.

payment4.q: Is there a minimum order amount?
payment4.a: No minimum order, but orders above 50 QR qualify for free delivery.
